name: Chocolate Chip Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar, margarine, and oil until well combined.
2. Add eggs, vanilla, and sour cream to the mixture. Beat well.
3. Mix flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt separately.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients in three additions.
5. Stir in grated zucchini and chocolate chips until just incorporated.
6. Pour batter into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
